runId: 2026-05-26-012-迭代一个需求-相册这个照片瀑布流希望是沾满屏幕的-宽度这块-把网站这块英文都修改

before_spawn: Generate or refresh context with `npm run harness:context-pack -- <run-id> --agents=<agents>`.
Generate the native plan with `npm run harness:native-plan -- <run-id> --agents=<agents>`.
Check `npm run harness:native-state -- <run-id> status` and close `ready_to_close` agents before spawning more agents.
If retained agents exceed the retention capacity, run `npm run harness:native-state -- <run-id> recommend-close` and release low-value retained agents first.
Spawn only tasks that are independent enough to run without blocking the main agent's immediate next step.
Use disjoint write scopes for parallel worker agents.
during_run: Do meaningful non-overlapping local work while subagents run.
Wait only when the next critical step needs the result.
Do not duplicate subagent work in the main window.
after_result: Write or summarize the result under `.harness/runs/<run>/logs/native-subagents/<agent>.result.md`.
Do not close a subagent only because it returned a result.
Keep completed subagents in `waiting_review` for follow-up until user acceptance, explicit release by the main agent, or run done/archive cleanup.
Close subagents only after marking them `ready_to_close` and recording the close audit.
